subject: Updating the port number for sparky
commit_message:
Updating the port number for sparky

Issue-ID: AAI-1992
Change-Id: I5391106ff6a08093699d497dd8326905eae20bfa
Signed-off-by: Arul.Nambi <arul.nambi@amdocs.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful

Patch Set 1:

This commit causes aai deployment to break. See comments in https://gerrit.onap.org/r/#/c/74418/

# helm upgrade -i aaa-aai local/aai --namespace onap -f ~/global-values.yaml --set global.pullPolicy=IfNotPresent,aai.enabled=true
Release "aaa-aai" does not exist. Installing it now.
Error: release aaa-aai failed: Deployment in version "v1beta1" cannot be handled as a Deployment: v1beta1.Deployment: Spec: v1beta1.DeploymentSpec: Template: v1.PodTemplateSpec: Spec: v1.PodSpec: Containers: []v1.Container: v1.Container: Ports: []v1.ContainerPort: v1.ContainerPort: ContainerPort: readUint32: unexpected character: �, parsing 664 ...nerPort":n... at yDir":{},"name":"modeldir"}]}}}}

It is in sparky-be deployment
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8000
        - containerPort:

In manifest it is:
        ports:
        - containerPort: {{ .Values.service.internalPort }}
        - containerPort: {{ .Values.service.internalPort2 }}
while internalPort2 is not defined.
